attacking_style: Initiates long-range solo attacks (40-60km out) before main climbs begin, exploiting transitional terrain and tactical chaos in chase groups. Shows preference for attacking early on circuits or when approaching key climbing sections.
team_tactics: Deployed as tempo-control domestique on flat sections in Grand Tours, then given freedom for breakaway opportunities. Team avoids placing GC pressure on him while using his engine for extended pulls.
terrain_preference: Excels on mixed terrain combining extended flat/rolling sections into medium climbs. Strong on uphill finishes when launched from breakaways. Time trial strength provides backup tactical option.
vulnerability: Caught in final 2-8km when specialist climbers or organized chase groups hunt him down. Long solo efforts leave him exposed to fresh legs on final steep pitches.
key_patterns: Attacks 40-60km from finish on transitional terrain, before specialists engage (3 instances)
Demonstrates exceptional pacing intelligence: manages energy to survive long solos and counter late (3 instances)
Initiates moves when chase groups become disorganized, exploiting tactical confusion (2 instances)
Functions as breakaway domestique in GC team support, controlling tempo before climbs (2 instances)
Strong uphill finish capacity from breaks, holding position against pure climbers (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2022-23 shows tactical intelligence intact but shifted to team domestique role versus 2020-21 breakaway stage-hunting success
